title: Div
description: How many integers x > 0 exist such that c0xa0 + c1xa1 + . . . + cn−1xan−1 is divisible by x0 + x1 + . . . + xm−1?
input:
The first line contains a single integer t (1 ≤ t ≤ 105), denoting the number of test cases.

Each test case is described with two integers n and m (1 ≤ n ≤ 105; 1 ≤ m ≤ 109), followed by n lines containing a pair of integers ci and ai each (|ci| = 1; 0 ≤ ai ≤ 109).

The sum of n over all test cases does not exceed 105.
output: For each test case, display the required number, or −1 if it is infinite.
source: Camp, Petrozavodsk Programming Camp, Winter 2020, Day 7: Gennady Korotkevich Contest 5, Contest, Open Cup, 2019/2020 Season, Stage 11: Grand Prix of Gomel
